meta.name: Spatially variable genes (Geary's C)
meta.description: Rank genes by local spatial autocorrelation (Geary's C) over the spatial graph; the ranking lands in uns['gearyC']. Geary's C is more sensitive to local (short-range) structure than Moran's I.
meta.provenance: squidpy sq.gr.spatial_autocorr API (mode='geary'); companion to the squidpy 'Moran's I' spatially-variable-genes vignette. Targets the visium_hne example.

readme: Ranks genes by Geary's C spatial autocorrelation over a hexagonal-grid spatial graph, complementary to the Moran's I recipe. No `n_perms`: scored analytically (the permutation path uses joblib's process pool, which can't spawn inside this app's worker thread).

params.name: coord_type
params.tooltip: spatial-graph geometry: grid for Visium hexagons, generic otherwise

params.name: n_neighs
params.tooltip: neighbors per node in the spatial graph (6 = Visium hexagonal grid)
